## URL redirection from remote source

Untrusted URL redirection depends on a [user-provided value](1).

[Show more details](https://github.com/mastodon/mastodon/security/code-scanning/530)
In the search controller, we disallow resolving URLs for logged-out users. We probably should do the same here.
ok, it seems like I can't read and completely missed the `if user_signed_in?`, sorry
Shouldn't it be done on behalf of the user who is clicking the link, so that it works for private posts as well?
I think we want to cache the redirect whenever possible so best to leave it out.
